titleStmt.title: SII 28.230: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 230. (A.R. No. 385 of 1913.)

summary.p: Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, south wall.

Records the undertaking by the sabhā of Uṟumūr, a dēvadānabrahmadēyam in Nalvayalūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai Rājēndrasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu not to levy the eḍar-kāṇi-ppoṉ amounting to 16 mañjāḍi and one kuṉṟi per annum payable to them by the ugachchar (instrumentalists) playing during the śrī-bali of God Mahādēvar in Chiruttirukkōyil, in consideration of their having received 5 kaḻañju tested by kāśu-kal from Araiyaṉ Vichchādiraṉ, residing in that ūr. The sabhā undertook to pay the exempted levy themselves.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilacce
lviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉak
koḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅ
kai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikai
pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum E
ṇṭicai pukaḻ Īḻamaṇṭamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai
ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉ
ṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷellā yāṇṭun toḻatakai
viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovi
rājarājagesaripanmarāna śrīrājarājadevaṟkki yāṇ
ṭu Irupattu muṉṟāvatu vaṭakarai rājendṛasiṁha vaḷa
nāṭṭu nalvayalūrk kūṟṟattu tevatāna brahmateyam Uṟu
mur sabhaiyom Ivūr Irukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ Araiya
ṉ viccātiraṉiṭai koṇṭa poṉ kācu kallāl Aiṅka
ḻañcuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu ciṟuttirukkoyil mahā
devarkku śrībeli koṭṭum Ukaccar Āṭṭai viṭṭaṉ
Eṅkaḷukku Iṭakkaṭava Eṭarkāṇip poṉ mukkā
le Oru mañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyum cantrātittavaṟ nāṅ
kaḷe Iṭṭu śrībeli koṭṭu mukaiccarkaḷai cantrāti
ttaval lippoṉ kāṭṭappeṟātomāṉom
sabhaiyom panmāyeśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 28.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
